query_string:
with customer_info as (
  select
    dtb_customer_id as customer_id
    , case
        when substr(created_app, 1, 10) between '2024-10-28' and '2024-11-17' then '24_before'
        when substr(created_app, 1, 10) between '2024-11-18' and '2025-01-28' then '24_after'
        when substr(created_app, 1, 10) between '2025-10-27' and '2025-11-16' then '25_before'
        when substr(created_app, 1, 10) between '2025-11-17' and '2025-12-08' then '25_after'
        else 'other'
      end as segment
    , case
        when substr(created_app, 1, 10) between '2024-10-28' and '2024-11-17' then 1
        when substr(created_app, 1, 10) between '2024-11-18' and '2024-12-08' then 2
        when substr(created_app, 1, 10) between '2025-10-27' and '2025-11-16' then 3
        when substr(created_app, 1, 10) between '2025-11-17' and '2026-01-27' then 4
        else 9
      end as segment_id
    , created_app
  from
    _l1_mysql_hp.customers
)

--, bingo_customer as (
--  select
--    customer_id
--    , '25_after' as segment
--    , 4 as segment_id
--    , created as created_app
--  from
--    l2_verification.tmp_bingo_target_customer_251211
--  where
--    substr(created, 1, 10) between '2025-11-17' and '2025-12-08'
--)

, merged_target_customer as (
  select
    distinct
    customer_id
    , segment
    , segment_id
    , created_app
  from (
    select * from customer_info where segment <> 'other'
  )
)

, order_log as (
  select
    customer_id
    , id as order_id
    , registered_business_date
    , purchased_datetime
    , total_amount_of_treatment_minutes
  from
    _l1_mysql_pos.orders
  where coalesce(deleted, 0) = 0
        and cancel_datetime is null
        --and status = 2
        and registered_business_date is not null
        and total_amount_of_treatment_minutes > 0
  group by
    1,2,3,4,5
)

, date_list as (
  select distinct registered_business_date from order_log where substr(registered_business_date, 1, 10) between '2024-10-28' and '2024-11-17'
    union all
  select distinct registered_business_date from order_log where substr(registered_business_date, 1, 10) between '2024-11-18' and '2025-01-28'
    union all
  select distinct registered_business_date from order_log where substr(registered_business_date, 1, 10) between '2025-10-27' and '2025-11-16'
    union all
  select distinct registered_business_date from order_log where substr(registered_business_date, 1, 10) between '2025-11-17' and '2026-01-27'
)

, customer_date_list as (
  select
    customer_id
    , substr(registered_business_date, 1, 10) as business_date
  from
    merged_target_customer
  cross join
    date_list
)

, agg_order as (
  select
    customer_id
    , segment
    , segment_id
    , substr(registered_business_date, 1, 10) as business_date
    , if(created_app < purchased_datetime, total_amount_of_treatment_minutes, 0) as treatment_minuites
  from
    order_log
  inner join
    merged_target_customer using (customer_id)
)

, merged as (
  select
    customer_id
    , segment
    , segment_id
    , year_of_week(date(business_date)) as yod
    , business_date
    , coalesce(treatment_minuites, 0) as treatment_minuites
  from
    customer_date_list
  inner join
    agg_order using (customer_id, business_date)
)

, agg_stats as (
  select
    customer_id
    , min(if(treatment_minuites > 0, business_date)) as first_order_date
    , count(distinct if(treatment_minuites > 0, business_date)) as order_count
    , avg(if(treatment_minuites > 0, treatment_minuites)) as avg_treatment_minuites
  from
    merged
  group by
    1
)

select
  customer_id as "Customer_ID"
  , first_order_date as "初回利用日_APP登録後"
  , segment_id as "セグメントNo"
  , segment as "セグメント"
  , order_count as "利用日数"
  , avg_treatment_minuites as "平均施術分数"
  , yod as "年"
  , business_date as "営業日"
  , treatment_minuites as "施術分数"
from
  merged
inner join
  agg_stats using (customer_id)
order by
  1,3
